scripts.dev:api: cd apps/api && uv run uvicorn src.main:app --reload --port 8000
scripts.sync: cd apps/api && uv run python scripts/sync_all.py
scripts.sync:nrcan: cd apps/api && uv run python scripts/sync_nrcan.py
scripts.sync:cmif: cd apps/api && uv run python scripts/sync_cmif.py
scripts.deploy:web: VITE_API_URL=https://critical-minerals-api.fly.dev pnpm build:web && wrangler pages deploy apps/web/dist --project-name=critical-minerals-tracker
